name: Portabello Mushroom Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
- Combine the marinade ingredients. Marinate the portobello mushrooms in this mixture for 1 to 2 hours.
- Mash a garlic clove into a fine paste. Stir it into the mayonnaise and add more thyme if desired.
- Grill or broil (or heat on a griddle) the mushrooms until they are soft, about 4 minutes per side.
- Drizzle the red bell pepper with balsamic vinegar and shallots. Grill or lightly toast the onion rolls. Spread mayo on each half of the rolls.
- Place the grilled mushrooms on two onion roll halves, cover with roasted bell pepper, cheese, and top half of rolls. Cut in half and serve hot.
- Makes two sandwiches.
